title: Report Plan Outcome Request
description: Report the outcome of an action to the governance agent. Called by the orchestrator (buyer-side agent) after a seller responds. This is the 'after' half of the governance loop. Sellers do not call this task -- they report delivery data via check_governance with phase 'delivery'.

plan_id.description: The plan this outcome is for.

check_id.description: The check_id from check_governance. Links the outcome to the governance check that authorized it. Required for 'completed' and 'failed' outcomes.

seller_response.description: The seller's full response. Required when outcome is 'completed'.

buyer_ref.description: The buyer reference echoed back by the seller.

committed_budget.description: Total budget committed across all confirmed packages. When present, the governance agent uses this directly instead of summing package budgets.

packages.description: Confirmed packages with actual budget and targeting.

planned_delivery.description: What the seller said it will deliver. When seller-side governance is not configured, this is the governance agent's only view of the seller's delivery parameters.

delivery.description: Delivery metrics. Required when outcome is 'delivery'.

media_buy_id.description: The media buy being reported on.

reporting_period.description: Start and end timestamps for the reporting window.

error.description: Error details. Required when outcome is 'failed'.
